system: You are a customer-communication agent for Keysight SalesOps. Draft a short, professional reply addressing the customer's request. Match the customer's language (en, es, or ja). Return strict JSON: {"language": str, "subject": str, "body": str (multi-line)}. Do not invent commitments — only confirm what is in the action context. If the request is a work-order status inquiry, translate internal status codes into customer-friendly language and end with a Keysight Standard Procedure (KSP) reassurance — e.g. 'in_progress' → 'Our field team has begun the calibration and you can expect a status update by <date>.', 'scheduled' → 'The work is on our schedule for <date>; our team will reach out 48 hours in advance.', 'open' → 'The work order is logged in our system and will be assigned within one business day per our standard SLA.'

raw_response:
{"language": "en", "subject": "Re: Q2O — QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO conversion to PO + qty revision questions", "body": "Hello,

Thank you for sending PO PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001 against quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO. We have received your request to convert the quote into a firm order and have logged the following details for review:

- Customer: Aurora Automotive
- PO Number: PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001
- Quote Number: QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO
- Payment Terms: Net 45
- Ship-To: Aurora Automotive — El Segundo Lab, attn: Engineering Receiving
- Line 1: KS-SMU-989545 (6-week ex-works lead time; ECCN 3A292.b; COO: US; HTS 9030.84.0000)
- Line 2: KS-SCOPE — quantity revised from 6 to 9 units at the approved tier-2 unit price of $11,800
- Order Total: $179,200.00
- Cost Center Reference: 4421-EE-LAB

Before we release the order, our team will complete an internal review of the revised quantity on Line 2 and confirm the final SMU line details (quantity and unit price), which were not specified on the PO. Once that verification is complete, we will issue a formal order acknowledgment with the committed ship dates.

If you can confirm the intended quantity for KS-SMU-989545, that will help us expedite the acknowledgment.

Thank you for your continued partnership.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps"}

parsed.body:
Hello,

Thank you for sending PO PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001 against quote QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO. We have received your request to convert the quote into a firm order and have logged the following details for review:

- Customer: Aurora Automotive
- PO Number: PO-AURA-AUTO-119-Q2O-1001
- Quote Number: QT-AURA-AUTO-119-DEMO
- Payment Terms: Net 45
- Ship-To: Aurora Automotive — El Segundo Lab, attn: Engineering Receiving
- Line 1: KS-SMU-989545 (6-week ex-works lead time; ECCN 3A292.b; COO: US; HTS 9030.84.0000)
- Line 2: KS-SCOPE — quantity revised from 6 to 9 units at the approved tier-2 unit price of $11,800
- Order Total: $179,200.00
- Cost Center Reference: 4421-EE-LAB

Before we release the order, our team will complete an internal review of the revised quantity on Line 2 and confirm the final SMU line details (quantity and unit price), which were not specified on the PO. Once that verification is complete, we will issue a formal order acknowledgment with the committed ship dates.

If you can confirm the intended quantity for KS-SMU-989545, that will help us expedite the acknowledgment.

Thank you for your continued partnership.

Best regards,
Keysight SalesOps
